_note: Reusable roster profile for aiko / aiko_services conversations. Core cast is Nick + Andy. Guests (e.g. someone who drops into one call) are NOT listed here on purpose — the DETECTED speaker count catches an extra voice so you can name them per-recording without polluting the standing roster.
title: aiko_services / aiko_chat working call
context: A technical working conversation in the aiko / aiko_services world: building aiko_chat on Andy Gelme's aiko_services framework — the aiko CLI, REPL, hyperspace, the actor model, storage/process-manager bootstrap, ChatServer, federation. Andy is the framework author and dominant teaching voice; Nick drives integration questions.

speakers.name: Andy
speakers.profile: Andy Gelme — old-school distributed-systems hacker, author of aiko_services. The dominant, teaching voice: explains the aiko CLI, REPL, hyperspace, actors, storage/process-manager bootstrap, ChatServer, federation. Frames things in priority order around what the others need.
speakers.anchor: rather than getting a long, waffley thing from me. You're basically getting the specific thing via Claude.

speakers.name: Nick
speakers.profile: Building aiko_chat on top of aiko_services; the main interlocutor asking integration questions on his own terms. Mentions ingesting docs into Claude to ask targeted questions.
